leadText: Pickpocket (Japanese: わるいてぐせ Bad Sticky Fingers) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability effect may be in need of research. Reason: Does Pickpocket work in a Max Raid Battle of if it is used by a wild Pokémon? What happens with Ogerpon's masks? What happens with Air Balloon ? You can discuss this on the talk page. When a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a move that makes contact , the Pokémon with this Ability will steal the held item of the attacking Pokémon. It will not activate if the Pokémon with this Ability already has a held item. It will not activate if the Pokémon with this Ability is knocked out by that move. Items stolen during Trainer battles will not be kept after the battle. If a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move that makes contact (such as Fury Swipes ), the item will not be stolen until after the final strike. If multiple Pokémon with this Ability are hit by the same move that made contact, Pickpocket will activate for the fastest one that does not already have an item. Pickpocket activates after Magician and the Sticky Barb , and after Thief and Covet steal a held item. It also activates after the user consumes a single-use item due to the attack that hit it, such as a Focus Sash . Consequently, the Pokémon that has Pickpocket will always end up with the item. Pickpocket also activates after Knock Off , Bug Bite , and Pluck , meaning that the stolen item will not be lost, and if it does lose its item due to these moves it can immediately steal another. The Life Orb and Shell Bell will activate before being stolen. The King's Rock and Razor Fang can still make the Pokémon with Pickpocket flinch even if stolen. Wild Pokémon cannot steal the player's Pokémon's held items. Pickpocket cannot steal from a Pokémon with Sticky Hold . It cannot steal Mail or a Z-Crystal . It cannot steal a Griseous Orb if either Pokémon is Giratina , a Plate if either Pokémon is Arceus , a memory if either Pokémon is Silvally , a Drive if either Pokémon is Genesect , a Mega Stone if either Pokémon can Mega Evolve using it, a Blue Orb if either Pokémon is Kyogre , a Red Orb if either Pokémon is Groudon , the Rusted Sword if either Pokémon is Zacian , the Rusted Shield if either Pokémon is Zamazenta , or Booster Energy if either Pokémon has the Ability Protosynthesis or Quark Drive . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Pickpocket has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
